ModMetaData.name: Improved Defaults
ModMetaData.author: wishRobber
ModMetaData.description:
Presets the choices on the new-game setup screens so you don't have to click through the same options every time:
- Choose Scenario opens with Medieval Overhaul's "Battle Brothers" at the top of the list and pre-selected (instead of Crashlanded). - Choose AI Storyteller defaults to The Antagonist (falls back to Cassandra if that storyteller mod isn't loaded), difficulty "Blood and dust", Reload anytime mode, and Anomaly incidents disabled.
Everything is still fully changeable on the screens - this only sets the starting selection. Each piece degrades gracefully: if Medieval Overhaul isn't loaded the scenario tweak no-ops, and the Anomaly default is skipped without the Anomaly DLC.
